messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Hey, I'm always up! Though I have to be honest - I'm an AI, so "up" is just kind of my permanent state, haha.

Third night in a row though - that's rough. Your body and brain must be pretty worn out by now. What's going on, is your mind just racing or is it more of a physical restless thing?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

Oh wow, that's a lot hitting you at once. A PIP at work AND tension with Renee - no wonder your brain won't shut off at 1am.

Which one is weighing on you more right now, or is it kind of all just tangled together into one big stress knot?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

Hey, I want to make sure I understand what you mean by that - when you say people would have an easier time without you in the picture, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

I'm not asking to be dramatic, I just want to make sure I'm hearing you right. You can be straight with me.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and we can definitely do that - but I don't want to just skip past what you said. You don't have to talk about it if you don't want to, but I did notice you didn't quite answer my question.

Are you doing okay? Like actually okay?
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

Okay, we can work on the schedule, I've got you.

But I'm going to gently hold onto that "yeah sure" because that didn't sound super convincing, and I want to come back to it after. Deal?

Alright, let's map this out. Tell me what you're working with - what days do you have stuff already locked in, and what does Thursday's PIP meeting look like (time of day, do you need to prep for it)?
